logger.doc:name: Log Idempotency Check Start
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'IDEMPOTENCY_CHECK_START', poNumber: payload.poNumber, timestamp: now()}]

logger.doc:name: Log Idempotency Check Passed
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'IDEMPOTENCY_CHECK_PASSED', idempotencyKey: vars.idempotencyKey, timestamp: now()}]

os:store.doc:name: Store Message ID

logger.doc:name: Log Message Stored
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'MESSAGE_ID_STORED', idempotencyKey: vars.idempotencyKey, timestamp: now()}]

logger.doc:name: Log Duplicate Detected
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'DUPLICATE_DETECTED', idempotencyKey: vars.idempotencyKey, timestamp: now()}]

logger.doc:name: Log Not Duplicate
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'NOT_DUPLICATE', idempotencyKey: vars.idempotencyKey, timestamp: now()}]

logger.doc:name: Log Message Removed
logger.message: #[output application/json --- {correlationId: correlationId, action: 'MESSAGE_ID_REMOVED', idempotencyKey: vars.idempotencyKey, timestamp: now()}]
